title: Saying No Politely
description: 今天练习拒绝但不生硬.

items.phrase: I don't think I can swing that.
items.cn: 表示自己这次安排不过来，比 I can't 更柔和.
examples: I don't think I can swing that. We can decide after we have more context.
I don't think I can swing that. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
I don't think I can swing that. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: I don't think I can swing that.
That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.phrase: I'll have to pass this time.
items.cn: 这个表达适合在朋友聊天里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: I'll have to pass this time. We can decide after we have more context.
I'll have to pass this time. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
I'll have to pass this time. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: I'll have to pass this time.
That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.phrase: That won't work for me, unfortunately.
items.cn: 这个表达适合在工作沟通里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: That won't work for me, unfortunately. We can decide after we have more context.
That won't work for me, unfortunately. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
That won't work for me, unfortunately. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That won't work for me, unfortunately.
That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.cn: 这个表达适合在日常交流里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: I wish I could, but... We can decide after we have more context.
I wish I could, but... I just want to make sure we're being practical.
I wish I could, but... Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.cn: 这个表达适合在工作沟通里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: Can we find another option? We can decide after we have more context.
Can we find another option? I just want to make sure we're being practical.
Can we find another option? Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.
